free_text: Possibilities of proton-activation analysis for
determining the content of elements from short-lived
radionuclides
English translation
Various compounds of the experimental elements type
CLDA served as target, being glued to the surface of
the foil by a sticky suspension of polystyrene
dissolved in dichloroethane. This film was subjected
to irradiation by a 0.01-0.3 muA beam of protons
for 5-20 sec.
volume of 90 cm 3 connected to a
multichannel AI-4096 analyzer
No information about source of uncertainties
By S.Mukhamedov.1982/05/22.
BIB section updated
Corrections were made according to new EXFOR rules.
New reference was added-English translation
of Atomic Energy.
SD: Major corrections in all Subents.
METHOD, ERR-ANALYS moved to Subent 001.
SD: Correction in Subent 029.
SD: Corrections in all Subents. Several
Subents were split.
